title: Columbus reviews officer’s Flock license plate searches tied to ‘ICE’ entry
summary: Columbus Police Department is under internal review for officer conduct involving Flock Safety license plate reader searches marked as 'ICE' enforcement in February 2025. An audit flagged unusual search patterns, prompting examination of compliance with department policies and the city's restrictions on assisting with civil immigration enforcement.

political_signal.description: Audit findings regarding potential policy violations in use of surveillance technology and immigration enforcement restrictions indicate administrative oversight and accountability mechanisms are active.

processing_notes: Article is Ohio-based (Columbus), not Syracuse-specific; included for CIO awareness of technology governance patterns and audit findings relevant to similar license plate reader systems
Highlights potential risks in database access control and audit trails for surveillance systems
No financial impact or budget implications mentioned
Investigation status ongoing; outcome pending internal review
